description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust, metallic head and a straight, cylindrical handle. The head has two distinct parts: a flat, circular striking face for driving nails and a curved, bifurcated claw for prying and removing nails. The handle is smooth and tapers slightly towards the end, providing a comfortable grip for the user. The entire object appears to be made of metal, giving it a uniform gray coloration and a solid, durable appearance. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained. The hammer's design is utilitarian, suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A metallic claw hammer with a smooth, straight handle and a dual-purpose head featuring a striking face and a curved claw. The surface is uniformly gray and appears solid and durable.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and flat striking face.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the narrow width of the head and handle, with the claw's split visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the claw and striking face clearly defined.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the end of the handle and the width of the hammer's head.
attribute_handle_type: straight, cylindrical steel handle with a smooth surface and no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved, split claw on the other for nail removal
